findings_fixed.title: Concurrent cost-log appends can interleave and corrupt costs.json lines
findings_fixed.fix_sketch: Added serialAppend() using a per-file Promise chain to serialize concurrent appendFile calls

findings_fixed.title: sprint_goal missing required fields return 500 instead of 4xx
findings_fixed.fix_sketch: Added MAX_ID_FIELD_LEN validation for repo field in sprint_goal and run command parsers

findings_fixed.title: queue/github.ts findLabelAddedAt paginates all issue events with no page count cap
findings_fixed.fix_sketch: Replaced unbounded paginate with capped paginate callback (MAX_PAGES=10, ~1000 events max)

findings_fixed.title: TaskStore insert never persists the attempts column it relies on
findings_fixed.fix_sketch: Added attempts column to SCHEMA constant so fresh DBs are self-consistent without relying solely on the migration

findings_fixed.title: defaultHaikuCall passes full prompt (including user brief) as argv — visible in ps aux
findings_fixed.fix_sketch: Rewrote defaultHaikuCall to use spawn() with stdin piping; removed prompt from argv

findings_fixed.title: issue-commenter.ts lastCommentId mutable closure races if comment() called before waitForApproval resolves
findings_fixed.fix_sketch: Replaced lastCommentId with lastCommentIdPromise so waitForApproval always awaits the latest comment() result

findings_fixed.title: DockerSandboxRunner mounts worktree as root with no read-only flag
findings_fixed.fix_sketch: Changed --user root to --user node; added :ro mount flag for typecheck and lint phases that don't need write access

findings_fixed.title: DockerSandboxRunner falls back to in-worktree execution without requiring IFLEET_ALLOW_SANDBOX_FALLBACK
findings_fixed.fix_sketch: Already fixed in prior session — IFLEET_ALLOW_SANDBOX_FALLBACK guard verified present in code

findings_fixed.title: runner.ts logCosts uses task.id as sprintId fallback, corrupting sprint-level cost aggregation
findings_fixed.fix_sketch: Changed fallback to warn+return instead of using task.id as sprintId; callers must set sprintId explicitly

findings_fixed.title: workers/claude.ts passes full brief as -p argv — visible in ps aux for all pipeline phases
findings_fixed.fix_sketch: Added stdin option to RunnerOptions; claude.ts now pipes brief to stdin; removed -p from argv

findings_fixed.title: Git auth token exposed via process args visible to local ps
findings_fixed.fix_sketch: Replaced -c http.extraheader argv injection with GIT_CONFIG_COUNT/KEY/VALUE env vars; filtered only dangerous GIT_ vars (DIR, WORK_TREE, etc.), not GIT_CONFIG_*

findings_fixed.title: pipeline/reviewer.ts is a deprecated re-export shim with no enforced removal deadline
auto-router in-memory cache never expires — stale routing decisions persist across sprint submissions
findings_fixed.fix_sketch: Added CACHE_TTL_MS=30min and CacheEntry{decision,expiresAt}; cache.get now checks expiresAt > now()

findings_fixed.title: contracts/hmac.ts verifyPayload has redundant length check after timingSafeEqual
findings_fixed.fix_sketch: Reordered expected.length===0 guard earlier; clarified comments explaining why padding-zeros always fail comparison

findings_fixed.title: audit-runner.ts markFindingsClosed batch path skips per-fingerprint dedup that appendToClosedJson uses
findings_fixed.fix_sketch: Added existingFingerprints Set check before cdata.closures.push to skip already-recorded closures

findings_still_open.title: server.ts deferringDiscordOut.postTaskCreated always returns empty threadId string without warning
findings_still_open.notes: Low risk cosmetic; deferred to next cycle

findings_still_open.title: audit-store.ts dbReadIndex returns null for both DB unreachable and zero-row cases without distinguishing them
findings_still_open.notes: Low risk cosmetic; deferred to next cycle

findings_still_open.title: candidate-gen.ts unused _cfg parameter signal
findings_still_open.notes: Parameter required by interface contract (stages.generateCandidates type); underscore prefix already signals intentional non-use
